name: Trade Flow Exhaustion with Momentum Filter
hypothesis: The trade flow exhaustion signal (iter018_exhaustion_pinnacle) fails when it mistakes the start of a strong trend for a reversal. This spec attempts to fix this by adding a momentum filter. We hypothesize that by only taking contra-directional signals when the short-term trend (rolling_momentum) is also against the trade flow spike, we can filter out the losing breakout scenarios and improve win rate.
mutation_note: Added a rolling momentum filter to address the parent spec's weakness of failing during strong trend breakouts.
